song.title: Lord I Would Have Thyself
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Lord, I would have Thyself In all Thy beauty, Take Thou control of all my life just now; In Thee to live, And move, and have my being, With full abandon, Lord, to Thee I bow.
[C] Chorus Thy blood was shed To cleanse from sin, Lord Jesus, Thy risen life transforms the old to new; I take my stand upon Thy word of promise: Sin shall not have dominion over you!
[V2] 2) Show me the things Of which I am unconscious, Lord, put Thy finger Now upon my heart; Whisper to me, Through Thy blest Holy Spirit, Tell me what grieves Him, That it may depart.
[V3] 3) Thou art my Victor over keen temptation, Thou art my Shield, To meet the darts of sin; Lord Jesus, Thou alone Can keep me trusting, And living out Thy glorious life within.
song.author: Mrs. J. I McClelland
